summary: A new AI model achieves near-human accuracy in translating idiomatic expressions across 50+ languages, setting a new standard for real-time multilingual communication in video calls.
A telecommunications firm has unveiled quantum encryption protocols to secure video calls, promising unprecedented privacy and protection against cyber threats.
New research highlights how AI-driven language apps are fostering cultural exchange and empathy among users, especially in underserved rural regions.
The rollout of 5G networks in developing countries is dramatically improving mobile connectivity, enabling more users to access high-quality video communication tools.
Despite advancements, AI assistants continue to struggle with understanding nuanced context in complex conversations, highlighting the need for further development in natural language processing.
